productScorecard.pr1IntegratedGameSession: passed: one authoritative default GameSession, eight same-basis residents/resources/alerts/details, schema3 projection v1, real Worker 600-second clock and 100000-tick zero-leak evidence
productScorecard.continuousClock: passed for PR-1: real Chromium Worker 600001.9ms on exact main, tick 0 to 18000, no UI advance/wait/drain clock
productScorecard.perceptibleMinimumLifecycle: passed for PR-1 only: one bounded authoritative lifecycle exposes moving and working across multiple product-consumed publications
productScorecard.pr2AutonomousTownLife: not yet passed: architecture/DAG planning is active; no reviewed eight-resident full-day autonomous behavior, three concurrent work kinds, path interpolation or human acceptance
productScorecard.playerAgencyAndBuilding: not started under PR-3; historical focused lamp/build command slices do not satisfy the roadmap commandable-product gate
productScorecard.mapFirstComprehensibility: not passed; PR-4 has not started
productScorecard.authoritativeGameSave: unsupported and fail-closed; no public GameSession save container or compatibility promise
productScorecard.internalPlayable: not earned; requires PR-5 reviewed 30-minute save/resume vertical slice and independent player evidence
productScorecard.platformAndRelease: Web remains demo-only and Windows remains unsigned controlled-test evidence; public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, hosted/paid services and public save compatibility remain Owner-gated

notes: Historical M0-M8 closeouts remain valid local capability evidence, not product readiness. PR-1 is now complete: WM-0163 composed the minimum GameSession, WM-0164 added schema3 projection v1 and Worker hosting, WM-0165 routed the default Web product to the Worker, WM-0167 repaired lifecycle/clock behavior, WM-0168 supplied real Worker/default-Web evidence, and WM-0166 reran and closed all exit gates. PR-2 has not started implementation. WM-0169 is the only active planning writer and proposes ADR-0018 plus strict serial WM-0170..WM-0175; those tasks must remain proposed/unclaimed until planning is independently verified, integrated and done. WM-0154 remains a blocked historical evidence packet because its old static/focused/synthetic-input scope cannot serve as current product acceptance; WM-0155 and WM-0156 remain proposed and frozen. GameSession save/load is unsupported. No autonomous-prototype, internal-playable, release, platform or public compatibility status is advanced by planning.
